acceptanceReviewed.evidence: roadmap.sh now sources roadmap-edges.sh, roadmap-node-notes.sh, and roadmap-registries.sh. evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize/line-count-check.log records roadmap.sh at 204 lines.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No qd report-check shell file exceeds 350 lines after the split.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize/line-count-check.log records every checker shell file below 350 lines.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: just qd-reports-check behavior remains unchanged for the current roadmap export and report set.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-check-modularize/qd-reports-check.log records the current roadmap export and report set passing after the split.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing registry, node, edge, export envelope, and node-note schema validations remain covered by the checker.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The moved helper files preserve the original function names, predicates, and error messages. The targeted smoke logs prove the moved registry, node milestone, edge endpoint, and node-note target validations still reject malformed exports.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and targeted malformed-roadmap smoke tests.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
